title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content:
Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include:
- Art exhibitions
- Museum entries
- Music concerts
- Film screenings and more

Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app).

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation."

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

title: How to Handle Login Issues?
content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

title: How to Cancel an Experience Reservation
content:
Users can cancel an upcoming reservation from the CultPass app:

- Open 'My Reservations' and select the experience
- Tap 'Cancel Reservation' and confirm the cancellation
- Cancel as early as possible so the place can be offered to another member
- If the cancellation option is unavailable, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Open 'My Reservations', choose the experience, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. If you cannot see that option, I can help escalate the request."

title: Where to Find an Event QR Code
content:
The entry QR code becomes available after a reservation is confirmed:

- Open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'
- Select the relevant experience to display the QR code
- Increase the screen brightness if venue staff cannot scan it
- If no QR code appears, confirm the reservation status and escalate if needed

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your QR code is in 'My Reservations'. Select the confirmed experience and show the code to venue staff when you arrive."

title: What to Do When an Experience Is Fully Booked
content:
A fully booked experience has no reservable places remaining:

- Ask the user to check again later in case another member cancels
- Recommend similar experiences with available places
- Do not promise that more places will be released
- Support cannot manually exceed a venue's capacity

**Suggested phrasing:**
"That experience is currently full. Places may reappear after cancellations, so please check again later or browse similar available experiences."

title: How Monthly Experience Quotas Work
content:
A member's monthly quota limits the number of included reservations:

- Each confirmed eligible reservation counts toward the current month's quota
- The quota resets at the start of the member's next monthly cycle
- Unused reservations do not carry over to the next cycle
- Premium experiences may have separate fees or eligibility rules

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your included reservation quota resets each month. Unused reservations do not roll over, and premium experiences may follow separate rules."

title: Understanding Premium Experience Fees
content:
Some premium experiences require payment in addition to the subscription:

- Any extra fee is displayed before the user confirms the reservation
- The amount can vary by venue and experience
- Never ask a user to send payment outside the official CultPass checkout
- Escalate disputed or duplicated charges to billing support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Premium experiences may include an extra fee. The exact amount is shown before confirmation and should only be paid through the CultPass app."

title: How to Update Account Details
content:
Users can update most profile details in the CultPass app:

- Open 'My Account' and select 'Personal Details'
- Edit the name, phone number, or communication preferences
- Email-address changes may require verification
- Escalate requests involving an inaccessible account or identity mismatch

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Go to 'My Account' and select 'Personal Details' to update your profile. Changing your email may require an additional verification step."

title: Requesting Accessibility Information
content:
Accessibility arrangements vary between venues and experiences:

- Check the accessibility section on the experience page
- Review details for step-free access, seating, captions, or hearing assistance
- Contact the venue or escalate when a required accommodation is not listed
- Do not assume that every venue provides the same facilities

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Accessibility details are listed on each experience page. If the accommodation you need is not shown, I can help you contact the venue or escalate the question."

title: What Happens When an Event Is Cancelled
content:
When an organizer cancels an experience:

- CultPass notifies affected members through the registered contact channels
- The cancelled reservation should no longer count against the member's quota
- Any refund for an extra premium fee follows the original payment method
- Escalate if the quota or payment has not been corrected after processing

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If the organizer cancels your experience, we will notify you. Your quota should be restored, and any eligible premium fee will be returned through the original payment method."

title: Refunds for Premium Experience Charges
content:
Refund eligibility depends on why and when a premium reservation was cancelled:

- Organizer cancellations are generally eligible for a refund
- Member cancellations follow the terms shown during booking
- Approved refunds return to the original payment method
- Do not promise a processing date; escalate overdue or missing refunds to billing support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Refund eligibility follows the terms shown when you booked. Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method; I can escalate one that appears overdue."

title: How to Contact CultPass Support
content:
Users should contact support through an official CultPass channel:

- Use the in-app help chat for account and reservation questions
- Include the relevant reservation or transaction details, but never a password
- For urgent venue-entry problems, use the contact option shown on the reservation
- Escalate security, payment, or account-access cases to the appropriate specialist

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reach CultPass Support through the in-app help chat. Share the relevant reservation details, but never send your password or full payment-card information."
